'''Roark Slader''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was once a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Entrallan Militia]] before he left to become a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], plying his 'trade' some time during the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. During this time he commanded both the [[Vee-Kir 4 Bulk Transport]] ''[[Slader's Raider I]]'' and the [[DP20 gunship/Legends|Corellian gunship]] ''[[Slader's Raider II]]''.
